{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Servants of Ruin
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Servants of Ruin]] struck down the [[Great Bison]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Servants of Ruin]] are a group that [[Dross]] has met.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
